root.content: Trich xuat mau cau truc tu BMAD Method va BMAD Builder repomix XML cho Wave 2 synthesis

children.content: Perform targeted XML investigation via delegated hivexplorer scan and synthesize pattern report

Delegate extraction of workflow/command/agent/template/phase/script patterns from repomix-gsd-get-shit-done.xml

Tham dinh bao cao trich xuat GSD pattern tu repomix XML theo pham vi read-only, doi chieu bang chung theo dong va file markers
Tong hop bao cao BMAD pattern extraction cho /hivefiver research tu 2 repomix XML read-only
Validate prior extraction report against repomix-gsd-get-shit-done.xml using delegated read-only research with enterprise_architect rigor

Produce evidence-backed read-only validation checkpoints (workflow chain, command-agent schema, template catalog, execute-phase wave model, reference/script catalog, and 7 principles) with line-cited proof

Delivered evidence-backed Wave 2 validation checkpoints with line-cited proof from repomix XML
Wave 2 validation audit complete: 17 evidence-backed citations from repomix XML extracted and validated
Tong hop ket qua doi chieu, danh gia overreach, va phat hanh verdict tham dinh voi trich dan bang chung

Run MCP-backed read-only research synthesis for Chain & Bridge architecture guidance before drafting document.

Coordinate delegated evidence scan across codebase and planning docs to synthesize guidance for 9-section CHAIN-BRIDGE-ARCHITECTURE.md (read-only).

Write docs/CHAIN-BRIDGE-ARCHITECTURE.md — the 9-section Chain & Bridge Architecture specification synthesizing GSD + BMAD patterns for HiveMind framework. Previous attempt failed (garbage output deleted). This is the IMMEDIATE blocker for HiveRD/HiveQ module creation.
Delegate docs/CHAIN-BRIDGE-ARCHITECTURE.md writing to hivemaker with section-by-section synthesis spec derived from constitutional docs + GSD/BMAD extraction reports
Delegate docs/CHAIN-BRIDGE-ARCHITECTURE.md authoring to hivemaker, then validate line count and section completeness with evidence.

Wave 2 research synthesis complete. Extracted structural patterns from BMAD Method (agents, workflows, modules, commands), BMAD Builder (builder workflows, schema validation), and GSD (phase/milestone/verification lifecycle). Ready for docs/CHAIN-BRIDGE-ARCHITECTURE.md authoring delegation.
Delegate docs/CHAIN-BRIDGE-ARCHITECTURE.md implementation to hivemaker with strict content contract, then independently validate line count, section presence, and diagram count.
Implement docs/CHAIN-BRIDGE-ARCHITECTURE.md within strict one-file scope, then validate line count, section presence, and diagram count with evidence.
Auto-realign via /hivefiver research, then delegate file authoring and verify line count/sections/diagrams with evidence.
Execute strict one-file delegation workflow to create docs/CHAIN-BRIDGE-ARCHITECTURE.md with 9 sections and evidence validation.
Gather repository-grounded assets and patterns for docs/CHAIN-BRIDGE-ARCHITECTURE.md: Chain/Bridge/Pack terms, 4-layer architecture, hook taxonomy, command/workflow/skill/template paths
Chain-Bridge spec + HiveRD module + HiveQ module complete. 55 new files, all synced, 181/181 tests pass, tsc clean. Ready for commit.
Execute immediate priorities: (1) Re-run validation script to verify sed fixes, (2) Fix 3 skills missing name: frontmatter, (3) Plan framework spine to address user's 'shallow/fragmented' critique
PLANNING ONLY — no execution. Synthesize full current state, define target state, produce gap-closing plan for lifecycle model implementation.

Visualize and internalize the complete entity dataflow: Project → Codewiki/Codemap/Code-Intel → Sessions → Delegations → Tasks/Subtasks → Trajectories. Map SOT entities, cross-references, and automation hooks. NO execution — comprehension only.

Prepare GSD-style planning SOT in .hivemind/planning/ — modular structure, evidence-grounded. Step 1: scan existing state of both .hivemind/ and .planning/ directories to understand what exists, what's reusable, what's noise.

Synthesize scan findings: classify existing .planning/ content as reusable/stale/noise, map .hivemind/ current state, propose modular GSD-style structure for .hivemind/planning/ before creating any files.
